title: callicarpa thozetii
intro: Callicarpa thozetii, also known as the purple coralberry, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa thozetii include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using it in tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
